entries.title: Accessibility guide
entries.lead: Focus rings, touch targets, semantic contrast pairs, and reduced motion.

entries.title: Alerts
entries.lead: Inline alerts, dismiss controls, and dialog-style confirmations.

entries.title: Alerts
entries.lead: Redirect: use alerts.html (legacy slug /components).

entries.title: Autocomplete
entries.lead: Suggest list, keyboard navigation, and combobox patterns.

entries.title: Badges
entries.lead: Dot badges, counts, and status labels on inline content.

entries.title: Button group
entries.lead: Segmented single-select and optional multi-toggle toolbars.

entries.title: Buttons
entries.lead: Primary, outline, and transparent variants with icon slots and touch targets.

entries.title: Cards
entries.lead: Card patterns for Copy, Newsletter signup, Blank slots, media ratios, and elevated panels.

entries.title: Carousel
entries.lead: Scrollable track, arrows, and scrollbar affordances.

entries.title: Checkboxes, radios & switches
entries.lead: Selection controls with accessible labels and group semantics.

entries.title: Colors
entries.lead: OKLCH palettes with hex fallback, semantic variables, and swatch classes.

entries.title: Contact form
entries.lead: Contact form recipe with fields, consent, and submit actions.

entries.title: Customization
entries.lead: Override Sass variables and CSS tokens to match your brand.

entries.title: Date picker
entries.lead: Calendar panel, month navigation, and field-group layout.

entries.title: Depth & shadows
entries.lead: Elevation shadows and z-index tokens for cards, overlays, and modals.

entries.title: Dividers
entries.lead: Horizontal rules and vertical keylines for section separation.

entries.title: Form
entries.lead: Vertical form layout with fields, actions, and validation messaging.

entries.title: Icons
entries.lead: Dimensioned icon slots for any SVG or icon font. Phosphor is used in docs as a reference example only.

entries.title: In-page anchors
entries.lead: In-page anchor list with scroll-spy style active states.

entries.title: Input fields
entries.lead: Labels, hints, validation states, and prefix icons for text inputs.

entries.title: Installation
entries.lead: Add PimentCSS via npm, CDN, or Sass compilation.

entries.title: Introduction
entries.lead: OKLCH tokens, live component preview, npm or CDN quick start, and paths to customize or verify accessibility.

entries.title: Layout
entries.lead: Container, 12-column grid, spacing utilities, and RGAA-friendly layout patterns for light and dark mode.

entries.title: Links & breadcrumb
entries.lead: Inline links, external trail icons, and breadcrumb navigation.

entries.title: Lists
entries.lead: Stacked list rows with indicators and optional actions.

entries.title: Loader
entries.lead: Spinners and in-context loading states.

entries.title: Menu & dropdown
entries.lead: Menu lists, dropdown panels, and keyboard-friendly disclosure.

entries.title: Modals
entries.lead: Modal overlay, focus trap, and action footers.

entries.lead: This page was split into Modals and Cards. Use the links below.

entries.title: Navigation
entries.lead: Header nav items, active state, and responsive shell patterns.

entries.title: Overview
entries.lead: Short recipes that combine forms, feedback, navigation, and content components into real pages.

entries.title: Pagination
entries.lead: Page controls, ellipsis, and compact table footers.

entries.title: Placeholder
entries.lead: Copy blocks, media ratio placeholders, and skeleton patterns.

entries.title: Progress
entries.lead: Linear bars, labeled progress, and circular indicators.

entries.title: Slots & layouts
entries.lead: Slot placeholders and column/row layout grids for wireframes.

entries.title: Snackbar
entries.lead: Transient snackbars with actions, auto-dismiss, and progress.

entries.title: Table + pagination
entries.lead: Data table with selection and pagination controls.

entries.title: Tables
entries.lead: Semantic row tables with a horizontal scroll region, plus column stacks and mobile-friendly card patterns.

entries.title: Tabs
entries.lead: Tablist, panels, and arrow-key navigation between tabs.

entries.title: Tags
entries.lead: Removable tags, filter chips, and pressed toggle states.

entries.title: Theme toggle
entries.lead: Light / dark mode control for headers, menus, and settings panels.

entries.title: Toolbar + modal
entries.lead: Toolbar with status alert, button group, and modal task flow.

entries.title: Tree
entries.lead: Expandable tree groups with toggle buttons and nested items.

entries.title: Typography
entries.lead: Heading scale, body utilities, and font loading for Zodiak and Plus Jakarta Sans.

entries.title: What's new
entries.lead: Release highlights for PimentCSS v1.0: tokens, components, patterns, documentation, and migration from Piment-Css.
